# Analyst makes shocking prediction on Bitcoin's next 'god candle'. In the world of cryptocurrency, a "god candle" is a serious market phenomenon when an exceptionally large green candlestick appears on the price chart. This candlestick indicates an intense surge in the cryptocurrency's price over a brief period, usually within a day or a few hours. The last time Bitcoin (BTC) saw a "god candle" was on Jan. 2, 2021, when "King Crypto" surged roughly 15% in a day, climbing from around $29,000 to over $33,000. Now, an analyst is predicting the timeline for the next "god candle" event. But there is a key test the oldest cryptocurrency in the world needs to pass. He compared it to the NASDAQ, which rose 57.4%, the S&P 500, which increased by 59.4% rise, gold's 163%, and silver's staggering 181% gain over the same period. But on a more serious note, he added a timeline for how gold and Bitcoin would react in the next couple of decades.
